title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage local LLMs with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama-hosted model as an LLM or chat endpoint.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-model chat, file upload, and admin panel.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with fuzzy-find model picker, chat history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit frontend.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor, or explain code using any Ollama model without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, Spring Boot starter, and reactive wrappers.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for integration-testing LLM features in pipelines.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, and answer questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama chat, image-captioning, and code-review into channels via mentions.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET 8 client library and CLI for Ollama with dependency-injection helpers for ASP.NET Core.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision Ollama on EKS/GKE with GPU node-groups and S3/GCS model cache.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama using reqwest and tokio; includes Axum example for embedding in services.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a tool for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.
